task_completion.description: Create two tracks named 'Music' and 'Voice Cues'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two distinct audio tracks in the Ardour timeline or mixer panel explicitly named 'Music' and 'Voice Cues'.

task_completion.description: Arrange moonlight_sonata.wav on the Music track with a specific gap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Music' track timeline. There should be audio regions from 0:00 to 0:20 and from 0:30 to 0:50, with a clear empty gap (silence) between 0:20 and 0:30.

task_completion.description: Place narration.wav snippets on the Voice Cues track at 18s and 28s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Voice Cues' track timeline. There should be audio regions starting at approximately the 0:18 and 0:28 marks on the time ruler.

task_completion.description: Set the Music track gain to -6 dB and Voice Cues track gain to +3 dB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the track headers or the mixer panel. The gain/fader value for the 'Music' track should read approximately -6.0 dB, and the 'Voice Cues' track should read approximately +3.0 dB.

task_completion.description: Add session markers for 'Work 1', 'Rest', and 'Work 2' at specific times.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the marker/location ruler at the top of the timeline. There should be markers labeled 'Work 1' at 0:00, 'Rest' at 0:20, and 'Work 2' at 0:30.
Look at the main Ardour window title bar; it should display 'hiit_mix', indicating the session was saved with the correct name.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ardour GUI to arrange the audio.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ardour application interface is visible and actively used to arrange the tracks, rather than a text editor modifying the .session XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent imported the actual audio files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The audio regions on the timeline display actual waveforms, confirming the real audio files from /home/ga/Audio/samples/ were imported and not just empty dummy regions.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal window showing a script or command (like cp or a python script) being used to automatically generate the session file or bypass manual assembly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tracks required: 'Music' and 'Voice Cues'. Music track gain target: -6 dB (tolerance 1.5 dB). Voice Cues track gain target: +3 dB (tolerance 1.5 dB). Music arrangement: Audio must be present at 10s and 40s, with a strict silence gap between 21s and 29s. Voice cues arrangement: Audio must start at 18s and 28s (tolerance 1s). Markers required: 'Work 1' at 0s, 'Rest' at 20s, 'Work 2' at 30s (tolerance 1s).
